task_snapshots.title: 341-02: Run SWE-Bench baseline scenarios (solo agents)
task_snapshots.description: Execute SWE-Bench Lite evaluation with solo-agent baselines [subtask of 07a7114366e9]. Run both solo-sonnet and solo-opus scenarios against 300 issues. Collect metrics: resolve count, resolve rate, wall-clock time, total cost. Save results to benchmarks/swe_bench/results/. Complete when: both baseline result files exist with full metrics (solo-sonnet.jsonl, solo-opus.jsonl) and summary JSON files show resolve rates and costs.
